info.name: Web of Science Expanded Search Documents via GET

params.name: databaseId
params.description: Database to search (e.g., WOS for Web of Science Core Collection).

params.name: usrQuery
params.description: Advanced search query string using Web of Science query syntax. Field tags include TS (topic), AU (author), TI (title), SO (source), DO (DOI), OG (organization), etc.

params.name: editions
params.description: Comma-separated list of WOS database editions to search.

params.name: publishTimeSpan
params.description: Publication date range filter in format begin=YYYY-MM-DD&end=YYYY-MM-DD.

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field and direction for sorting results.

items.docs: Submit search queries to retrieve Web of Science document metadata. Supports the Web of Science Advanced Search Query syntax with field tags, boolean operators, and wildcard characters. Returns a query ID and initial results page for subsequent pagination.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Search Documents via POST

items.docs: Submit search queries via POST to retrieve Web of Science document metadata. Equivalent to the GET search endpoint but allows larger query parameters in the request body.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Fetch Query Results

params.name: queryId
params.description: Query identifier returned from the search endpoint.

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field and direction for sorting results.

params.name: viewField
params.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in response.

items.docs: Retrieve records from a previously submitted search query using the query ID returned from the search endpoint. Supports pagination through large result sets with configurable record counts and sorting.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Record IDs for Query

params.name: queryId
params.description: Query identifier returned from the search endpoint.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of record IDs to return.

items.docs: Retrieve only the unique identifiers for records matching a previously submitted search query. More efficient than retrieving full records when only UIDs are needed for deduplication or subsequent lookups.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Records by Unique ID

params.name: uniqueId
params.description: Single WOS unique identifier or comma-separated list of UIDs (e.g., WOS:000349044100001,WOS:000349044100002).

items.docs: Retrieve one or more Web of Science records directly by their unique identifiers. Supports comma-separated lists of UIDs for batch retrieval. Returns full item-level metadata including addresses and affiliations.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Citing Articles

params.name: uniqueId
params.description: WOS unique identifier of the article to find citing articles for.

items.docs: Find articles that cite a specific Web of Science document identified by its unique identifier. Returns citation metadata and times-cited counts from the Web of Science Core Collection.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Get References for Article

params.name: uniqueId
params.description: WOS unique identifier of the article to get references for.

items.docs: Retrieve the reference list cited by a specific Web of Science document. Returns all cited works including those outside the Web of Science Core Collection.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Related Records

params.name: uniqueId
params.description: WOS unique identifier of the article to find related records for.

params.name: count
params.description: Number of related records to return.

items.docs: Discover records that share cited references with a specified Web of Science article. Returns the parent record plus related documents ranked by the number of shared references.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Citation Report for Query

params.name: queryId
params.description: Query identifier for the result set to report on.

items.docs: Generate a citation report for a query result set, providing aggregate citation statistics including total citations, average citations per item, h-index, and year-by-year citation counts.

info.name: Web of Science Expanded Get Category Context for Record

params.name: uniqueId
params.description: WOS unique identifier of the article.

params.name: citeType
params.description: Scope of category context (Citing, Referenced, or Aggregated).

items.docs: Retrieve the categorization context for citing and cited references of a Web of Science article. Returns ASCA traditional category distribution for the specified scope.
